blocks.content: Shirone is a strong kid. He's not the type to be discouraged by a single loss; if anything, he'll gain even more from it. A true teacher should also teach how to learn from defeat.

blocks.speaker: Olivia
blocks.content: I will take this as an excuse from a 4th-rank loser.

blocks.speaker: Alpheas
blocks.content: Kukuku, well, in any case, today I'm just a spectator today. Shirone and Dante. This will be really interesting.
Finally, the time for the match arrived.
As Sienna, who was in charge of the referee, walked to the center of Heaven's Trial, the atmosphere in the training ground became solemn.
In a moment, the greatest talent of Alpheas Magic Academy and the greatest talent of the kingdom will clash.
Mark, who was trembling as if he were having trouble breathing, looked over at Iruki sitting beside him.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: Ugh, I feel like my blood is drying up. Senior, do you think Senior Shirone can win?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: I think both of them will have their opportunities. Shirone has a wider variety of offensive magic, but Dante's tactical execution can't be underestimated. If the number of magic circles increases, it could put Shirone in a tough spot.
Even from Iruki, who could be called his closest aide, a hopeful assessment did not come out.
Just as Mark was about to complain with a gloomy expression, the students suddenly erupted in cheers.
Shirone and Dante were walking up to the side of Heaven's Trials.
Sienna, who was in charge of the refereeing, greeted the former and current principals with courtesy, then called Shirone and Dante to the center of Heaven's Trials.
The faces of the students who had been watching the two people meet with interest turned pale.
This was because Shirone was approaching Dante beyond the designated location.

blocks.speaker: Shirone
blocks.content: Oops!
Shirone quickly snapped back to reality and stopped walking, but by then, Dante's face was already right in front of him.
He had been so deep in thought that he hadn't noticed.
The students, interpreting Shirone's actions as a provocation, became even more excited, but those who knew Shirone's personality had a different take.
It was obvious that he was nervous.
In response to the unusual situation, Kilain gave a sympathetic smile.

blocks.speaker: Kilain
blocks.content: Hoho! How is that good? In this day and age, who still tries such cheap provocations?
There had been many challengers who had tried similar tactics against Dante in the past.
Each time, Dante had calmly countered, leaving his opponents humiliated.

blocks.speaker: Kilain
blocks.content: Huhu, Dante, I wonder what kind of performance you'll start with today… Huh?
A look of confusion appeared on Kilain's face.
Dante wasn't moving either; he was just staring intently at Shirone.
Even though Sienna was explaining the rules, it didn't seem like either of them was listening.
Dante's friends were also puzzled, as they had never seen him like that before.

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: Dante, don't you think he looks a little nervous?

blocks.speaker: Savina
blocks.content: That's not like him. He was in good condition just this morning, right? Let's wait a bit; maybe it's just part of his showmanship.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: He can't help but be nervous.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: Huh? He can't help but be nervous?
Mark turned his head with shocked eyes.
He was so nervous that he was surprised by whatever Iruki said.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Shirone has never lost in competition. Although he's only been learning magic for a short time, he's been overcoming highly difficult obstacles to get here.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Of course, Dante has also spent a long time at the top, achieving an almost impossible record.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Now, these two are about to clash.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Defeat is a record engraved in a person's life. It changes the direction of their life in some way.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: But neither of them has experienced defeat yet.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: They've both maintained an abnormal career where even a single mistake wasn't allowed.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: They don't want to lose that.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: And today, one of the two will have their careers completely ruined.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: They will live their lives with the record of defeat engraved on their minds.
Mark was dumbfounded.
Was this the world where geniuses lived?
Having been defeated at the age of fifteen, he was in a state where he couldn't even grasp the feeling.
But he didn't feel any regret.
He only hoped that Shirone, who had defeated him, would win again, and his heart pounded so hard it almost hurt.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: Ugh. This is driving me crazy. When are they going to start?
Sienna, who had explained the rules, instructed everyone to keep their distance.
But neither of them moved.
It was as if they couldn't hear her.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: Both of you! Return to your designated positions and wait.
All sorts of thoughts crossed Dante's mind.
Who on earth is this boy?
At first, he said he didn't want to fight, that he didn't care about power or fame, but now he was glaring as if he was ready to devour him.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: No. Let's not think about it.
Dante suddenly came to his senses.
Having never lost in 472 matches, it was easy to assume he wouldn't lose now.
He just had to crush Shirone like he had with every other challenger.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: Shirone! Dante! Follow the referee's instructions!
Only after Sienna shouted fiercely did the two come to their senses and back away without breaking eye contact.
Upon reaching his designated position, Dante took a deep breath and moved his body to shake off the tension.
The 60-meter distance seemed farther than usual.
But he has defeated all the strong mages and climbed up.
If he fought like usual, it is a match he cannot lose.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Yes, I just need to fight my way.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: His only option is to strike first.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Let's use that to my advantage.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: As a Target type, I have the speed advantage.
He accelerated his Four-Way Zone to the maximum and deployed a teleportation magic circle under Shirone's feet.
It wouldn't cause much of an impact, but it was the best way to disrupt his balance.
After that, he would simply adapt to the situation as he always had.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: And now, Shirone versus Dante, Dante versus Shirone…
Sienna's words were buried in the loud cheers.
In ten seconds, they would collide.
It felt as though the very air temperature had risen from the heat of the moment.
Sienna gave up on giving a signal by voice and raised her hand instead.
The students' cheers grew even louder, and both Shirone and Dante locked their gazes on her hand signal.

blocks.speaker: Sienna
blocks.content: Begin!
Dante unleashed a super-fast Sequencing.
The numbers began at one and quickly reached ten thousand as his Target Type Spirit Zone extended, engulfing Shirone.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Got him…
Just as Dante thought that, his eyes widened in shock.
Dozens of Photon Cannons had already reached right in front of him.
Dante quickly switched his omniscience and deployed a defensive magic circle.
The barrage of Photon Cannons pounded against the magic circle.
It was then that he realized what was happening.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Immortal Function!
From the start, Immortal Function was opened.
In addition, Photon Cannon was fired nonstop without regard.
The physical force was on par with Earth Magic, and the speed was just as fast.
Experiencing it firsthand, Dante found it an incredibly annoying magic.
Every time a crack appeared in his defensive magic circle, information was accumulated and repaired, but he could no longer endure it.
When Dante teleported to escape, Shirone, who had been rapidly firing the Photon Cannons, also used photonization to follow him.
Two streaks of light painted the sky above Heaven's Trials.
The students were stunned by the barrage of attacks—no, it was more like a one-sided display of firepower—right from the start.
Iruki burst into a hollow laugh.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: Of course, it was a good strategy.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: However, he didn't expect that Shirone, who has a cautious nature, would stake something so early.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: It seems like he's trying to prevent Dante from even thinking about casting a magic circle from the beginning.

blocks.speaker: Mark
blocks.content: This is amazing. Is this really the same person who had a teleportation contest with me last semester?

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Probably not.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: Anyway, not giving the opponent any time to use their skills shows that Shirone is serious.

blocks.speaker: Amy
blocks.content: With things like this, the outcome is unpredictable.
Shirone pressured Dante with dazzling movements.
Using the Patrol technique to block him from the sides, he then cast Rainbow Drop in reverse, soaring into the sky.
Dozens of photon clusters were created every second beneath him, trailing behind.
Shirone fired them all.
As Photon Cannons dominated the space, Dante had no choice but to descend to the ground as his only escape route.
Though aerial bombardments followed, he didn't dare look up.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Damn it! Let me use some magic too! This guy is completely insane!

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: No, maybe this was better.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Anyway, Shirone couldn't maintain Immortal Function for long.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: If Dante could just survive the initial onslaught, victory would be his.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Yes, at this rate, it won't last more than 30 minutes at most.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: If I can just hold out for 30 minutes...!
Photon Cannons raked the ground in a line as they fell.
Dante changed direction and checked Shirone's position.
Dozens of photon clusters were pouring down on the spot where he expected Shirone to be.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Damn it! Forget 30 minutes, I can't even hold out for 5!
After blocking the first bombardment with a defensive magic circle, he used the delay between the first and second bombardments to find an escape route and slip through the barrage.
However, there was nowhere else to move.
Without realizing it, he had been pushed to the outskirts of Heaven's Trials.
Shirone used the Patrol technique to dominate the space, cornering Dante at the very edge.
When it looked like Dante might escape, Shirone hurled a compressed photon in his hand.
A streak of light shot out.
Dante, unable to escape the corner, hastily deployed another defensive magic circle.
The weight of this attack was on a whole different level compared to the previous ones.
When the second and third attacks struck the same spot, cracks began to form even as Dante tried to reinforce the magic circle.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: No matter how nervous he is, has his mind gone rigid too?

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: He should know after facing someone like this.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: There's no way you can stop that with a hastily made magic circle.
As the magic circle that had been blocking Dante shattered into pieces, Shirone rushed forward in a straight line as if compressing space into a point.
Dante, rather than trying to dodge, chose to stay put to buy himself time to prepare.
He spread a magic circle in all directions to block the approach, but Shirone lowered his body and unleashed Photon Explosion.
Ugh!
As the barrage of 30 pulses per second pounded the magic circles, Dante felt as if his mind was being torn apart.
He had seen Photon Explosion used in tactical training, but since it was only used for defense, he didn't think it would be that powerful.
However, after experiencing it firsthand, he realized that it was truly a large-scale destruction magic.
His mind was shaken as all seven magic circles were shattered.
Dante covered his face and looked ahead over his wrist.
But Shirone was nowhere to be seen.
As he lowered his gaze, he locked eyes with Shirone, who was crouched down with a photon compressed in his hand.
Shirone darted into Dante's range, swinging his hand.
The afterimage of the photon trailed behind him.
For a mage, two seconds is enough time to enhance an attack's power.
Dante, without time to think of anything else, quickly deployed a defensive magic circle.
Photon Cannon, thrown from close range, smashed through the magic circle in one strike and hit him in the abdomen.
Dante felt dizzy for a moment, but after quickly checking his condition, he realized the impact wasn't as severe as he had feared.

blocks.speaker: Dante
blocks.content: Tch! At least I managed to block it! Now I just need to...!
At that moment, Shirone grabbed Dante's collar with both hands and activated photonization.
Without even having time to register the unexpected physical confrontation, Dante was forced to move at the speed of light.
As the photonization wore off, Dante found himself disoriented, unable to tell where he was.
He frantically searched for Shirone's location.
When he turned around, Shirone was nowhere to be seen, and countless photon bullets filled his field of vision.
Kwakwakwakwakwakwakwakwakwang!
As Photon Cannon struck, the spot where Dante had been was filled with blinding white light.
The students tried to shield their eyes with their fingers, but they still couldn't make out what was happening.
Shirone stopped his attack and caught his breath.
Only five minutes had passed since the battle began.
Dante, with seven magic circles spread out in front of him, covered his face with both arms.
However, the light from the magic circles soon dimmed and shattered like glass.
One of Dante's knees buckled, hitting the ground with a thud.
The students' eyes widened in shock.
While Dante had managed to deploy his magic circles, it was clear they hadn't completely blocked the attack.

blocks.speaker: Iruki
blocks.content: It finally hit. This one's triggered Impact judgment.
Dante was known for never giving up the initiative in any situation.
Once the battle began, his genius-level tactics would usually neutralize the opponent's attacks, allowing him to finish them off with a counter.
However, Shirone succeeded in delivering an attack that could be considered an effective hit, breaking through the iron wall-like defense barrier.
Of the 500 people gathered at the venue, not a single person uttered a word.
Even Kilain, who had watched Dante since he was a child, and his friends wore expressions of disbelief.
472 matches, 472 wins.
Dante, who boasted an undefeated record, had been brought to his knees within just five minutes.
A gust of wind swept through Heaven's Trials, reflecting the brutal intensity of the battle.
